iletisim.aciklama: At our modern production facility in Izmir Kemalpasa, we develop world-class stainless steel technologies. Reach out directly to our technical team for your projects.

hero.title: Process and Storage Technologies
hero.desc: Designed to international ASME and PED standards for the food, chemical, and pharmaceutical industries; mega-capacity stainless steel solutions up to 150 tons.

services.title: Our Industrial Solutions
services.desc: Fully equipped stainless steel systems custom-designed according to your recipe, capacity, and physical facility conditions.

items.title: Mega Capacity Storage Solutions
items.desc: Long-lasting stainless silos with wind and seismic load calculations in capacities up to 150 tons, with the advantage of on-site assembly tailored to your needs.

items.title: High Precision Process Tanks
items.desc: Flawless homogenization for your demanding recipes. Agitated production lines integrated with thermodynamic jackets and PLC automation.

items.title: Heavy-Duty Chemical Reactors
items.desc: Zero tolerance against aggressive corrosion, high pressure, and full vacuum. Titanium-alloyed safety at API 650 and ATEX standards.

items.title: Ultra Hygienic Food and Dairy Tanks
items.desc: Food codex approved designs that eliminate bacterial risks with polyurethane insulation technology that maintains the cold chain and fully automatic CIP washing systems.

why_us.title: Heavy Duty Production with Zero Defect Principle
why_us.desc: Unlike ordinary boiler manufacturers, we simulate your project in ASME and EN standards and guarantee your hazardous processes by passing every weld seam through RT (X-ray) testing.

box1.title: Global Export
box1.desc: Full delivery in international norms from Asia to Europe.

box2.title: A-Type Quality
box2.desc: Periodic approval by independent audit organizations.
